item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Affordable Insulin Now Act (H.R.6921)
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Affordable Insulin Now Act (H.R.6921)

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

H.R.6921 in the 119th Congress would extend the $35/month Medicare insulin price cap (established in the 2022 IRA for Medicare beneficiaries) to all ACA marketplace plans and private insurance, and to all insulin products.

What does it actually do?

  • $35/month cap: Out-of-pocket cost for insulin capped at $35/month for covered patients.
  • Coverage scope: Extends from Medicare to ACA plans and group-market private insurance.
  • All insulin products: Covers all FDA-approved insulin formulations, not just specific brands.
  • Pre-deductible coverage: Insulin must be covered before deductible is met (patients pay $35/month from day one of plan year).

Who votes when?

  • House Ways & Means + Energy & Commerce: Active consideration
  • Senate Finance: Companion under review
  • President: Signature expected if both chambers pass

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes directly with three cooperative-healthcare initiatives:

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Dental Medicare Coverage
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Dental Medicare Coverage

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Medicare dental-coverage expansion legislation in the 119th Congress. Standard Medicare currently excludes most dental care, leaving ~24M older adults without coverage.

What does it actually do?

  • Medicare Part B dental-coverage addition (preventive + restorative)
  • Phased implementation over several years
  • Coverage standards for dentures, root canals, periodontal care
  • Provider-network expansion provisions

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #5 The Family Table (older-adult care) and #7 MSA (dental Substitution-routing where federal coverage falls short).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Hearing and Vision Medicare Coverage
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Hearing and Vision Medicare

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Medicare hearing and vision coverage expansion in the 119th Congress. Standard Medicare excludes hearing aids, hearing-aid exams, eyeglasses, and routine vision care.

What does it actually do?

  • Medicare hearing-aid coverage (typically every 5 years)
  • Hearing-exam coverage
  • Eyeglass coverage (one pair every 2 years)
  • Routine vision-care coverage
  • Provider-supply provisions to address current OTC-hearing-aid market

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #5 The Family Table (older-adult sensory-care impacts caregiver coordination) and #7 MSA (hearing/vision Substitution at participating providers).

item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Expansion
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Medicare Drug Price Negotiation Expansion

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Expansion of Medicare’s drug-price negotiation authority (established in the 2022 IRA) in the 119th Congress. Current proposals expand the number of drugs subject to negotiation and accelerate the implementation timeline.

What does it actually do?

  • Drug count: Increases the number of high-cost drugs CMS can negotiate annually
  • Timeline: Accelerates eligibility-after-launch threshold
  • Insulin/inhalers: Specific provisions for these drug classes
  • Part B + Part D: Extends negotiation authority to Part B (physician-administered) drugs
  • Penalties: Strengthens manufacturer-noncompliance penalties

Who votes when?

  • Senate Finance + House Ways & Means + Energy & Commerce active consideration

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Composes with #6 Tatiana Schlossberg Health Accords drug-pricing transparency, #7 MSA Substitution-routing economics, and the Affordable Insulin Now Act + Lower Costs More Transparency Act Bounty Posters.
